title: The Lord’s Martial Art Chronicles
description: In an alternative timeline where the samurai didn't disappear after the Meiji Restoration, a rising tide of ghosts—commonly called samurai spirits—assails modern-day Shinjuku, Tokyo. These spirits frequently possess the bodies of the living and then go on rampages. ​The young lord Teruie, whose domain is Shinjuku, sets out to battle the spirits at the request of his classmate and subject, Mijuu, however..., This is the start of a historical modern-day drama that follows the journey of a young feudal lord living in the present!
author: Shibamura Hiroshi
